name: DOEH Commerce
description: Connects this site to the DOEH Orders API so a theme can submit and read orders. A server-side connector only — it owns API auth, request signing, payload mapping, error normalization and order retrieval; it renders NO cart, catalog or checkout UI (themes own all presentation). The merchant secret key stays on the server and is never exposed to the browser; a customer's sign-in is never used as the order credential.
description_mm: ဤဆိုက်ကို DOEH Orders API နှင့် ချိတ်ဆက်ပေးပြီး theme တစ်ခုက order များ တင်သွင်း/ဖတ်ရှုနိုင်စေသည်။ Server-side connector သာဖြစ်သည် — API auth, request signing, payload mapping, error normalization နှင့် order retrieval ကိုသာ ကိုင်တွယ်ပြီး cart/catalog/checkout UI မ render ပါ (theme က presentation အားလုံးကို ပိုင်သည်)။ Merchant secret key ကို server ပေါ်တွင်သာ ထားရှိပြီး browser သို့ ဘယ်တော့မှ မထုတ်ပါ။ customer ၏ sign-in ကို order credential အဖြစ် အသုံးမပြုပါ။
author: Beyond Plus

settings.name: environment
settings.label: Environment
settings.help: Selects the DOEH Orders API host. Sandbox = sandbox-api.doehpos.com; Production = api.doehpos.com. The key's own environment (sk_test_ / sk_live_) must match.

settings.name: secret_key
settings.label: Merchant Secret Key
settings.help: The sk_test_… / sk_live_… key for THIS shop, with the orders scope. SERVER-SIDE ONLY — it stays on this server and is never sent to the browser. Treat it like a password.

settings.name: default_fulfillment
settings.label: Default fulfilment
settings.help: Applied to a submission when the theme does not set one. Optional.

settings.name: enabled
settings.label: Enable order submission
settings.help: When off, the connector refuses every call (a kill switch without deactivating the plugin).
